achievements.antiFarmingNote: Repeating the same idempotency key or resubmitting the same completed event does not create additional progress.
achievements.completionEvidence: One authoritative, eligible event must be applied successfully rather than replayed, rejected, or only described in narrative copy.
achievements.playerFacingDescription: Complete one recognized progression event and establish the first permanent entry in your economic history.
achievements.rewardDisclosure: Awards one skill point after authoritative completion and atomic claim processing.
achievements.title: First Step

achievements.antiFarmingNote: Malformed, stale, wrong-game, duplicated, or conflicting replay events are not valid shortcuts to the threshold.
achievements.completionEvidence: The counter advances only from authoritative events that pass source, game, replay, and award validation.
achievements.playerFacingDescription: Build a record of twenty-five recognized progression events across sustained economic participation rather than one isolated success.
achievements.rewardDisclosure: Awards one skill point after the twenty-fifth eligible event is committed.
achievements.title: Consistent Growth

achievements.antiFarmingNote: The threshold rewards breadth and persistence; replay protection prevents artificial event multiplication.
achievements.completionEvidence: Progress must come from committed authoritative events over time; retries may confirm success but cannot multiply it.
achievements.playerFacingDescription: Reach one hundred recognized progression events and demonstrate durable participation across the long campaign horizon.
achievements.rewardDisclosure: Awards two skill points after the one-hundredth eligible event is committed.
achievements.title: Long Horizon

achievements.antiFarmingNote: Repeated delivery of the same Contract completion or a mismatched Contract event does not advance the counter.
achievements.completionEvidence: Each counted Contract must reach the recognized completed state through the authoritative Contract workflow.
achievements.playerFacingDescription: Complete five Contracts with accepted evidence, authoritative completion state, and no duplicate reward claim.
achievements.rewardDisclosure: Awards one skill point and five general career reputation after atomic completion.
achievements.title: Contract Professional

achievements.antiFarmingNote: Cancelled, simulated, malformed, or duplicate business events cannot be converted into achievement progress.
achievements.completionEvidence: Only authoritative completed business-operation events with valid game, player, source, and idempotency scope count toward this achievement.
achievements.playerFacingDescription: Complete five recognized business operations and show that the enterprise can execute documented work repeatedly.
achievements.rewardDisclosure: Awards one skill point and five general career reputation after the fifth eligible business operation is committed atomically.
achievements.title: Enterprise Operator

achievements.antiFarmingNote: Replaying a recipe completion or reusing a conflicting event key does not create another counted operation.
achievements.completionEvidence: The Crafting runtime must commit the eligible completion; planned recipes and failed jobs do not count.
achievements.playerFacingDescription: Complete five recognized Crafting operations using valid recipes, inputs, authorization, and completion events.
achievements.rewardDisclosure: Awards one skill point and five general career reputation after the fifth eligible Crafting completion is committed atomically.
achievements.title: Workshop Regular

achievements.antiFarmingNote: Self-trading, duplicate settlement delivery, or conflicting replay keys cannot inflate the settlement counter.
achievements.completionEvidence: Only authoritative settlement events count; open, rejected, cancelled, or unmatched orders do not satisfy the criterion.
achievements.playerFacingDescription: Complete ten settled market orders and demonstrate participation through final settlement rather than order submission alone.
achievements.rewardDisclosure: Awards one skill point and four reputation in the player’s assigned country scope.
achievements.title: Market Participant

achievements.antiFarmingNote: Reopening a chapter, repeating its delivery, or submitting a wrong-story event cannot create additional progress.
achievements.completionEvidence: Each chapter must emit a supported authoritative completion event; narrative text alone is not completion state.
achievements.playerFacingDescription: Complete three recognized story chapters and establish a traceable path through the campaign’s economic and civilian decisions.
achievements.rewardDisclosure: Awards one skill point and six campaign story reputation after the third eligible chapter completion is committed atomically.
achievements.title: Story Pathfinder

achievements.antiFarmingNote: Players cannot manufacture a penalty solely to farm recovery, and immutable corrections preserve the full audit history.
achievements.completionEvidence: The authoritative reputation history must show a real negative score followed by eligible applied recovery, not an erased record.
achievements.playerFacingDescription: Recover one reputation score from a verified negative value to a non-negative value through legitimate corrective conduct.
achievements.rewardDisclosure: Awards one skill point; the recovered reputation remains governed by its original scope and visibility.
achievements.title: Reputation Recovery

achievements.antiFarmingNote: Duplicate claims, inactive definitions, or repeated unlock requests do not increase the distinct-skill counter.
achievements.completionEvidence: Four distinct active skill definitions must be unlocked through the authoritative skill-claim process.
achievements.playerFacingDescription: Unlock four distinct active skills and build usable capability beyond a single isolated specialization while preserving each skill’s prerequisites and cost.
achievements.rewardDisclosure: Awards one additional skill point after the fourth distinct unlock.
achievements.title: Skilled Generalist

achievements.antiFarmingNote: Multiple skills in one track improve depth but do not count as additional specialization tracks.
achievements.completionEvidence: The authoritative unlock set must include active skills from three distinct tracks among markets, enterprise, production, and diplomacy.
achievements.playerFacingDescription: Unlock at least one skill in three different tracks and demonstrate cross-domain capability without abandoning specialization.
achievements.rewardDisclosure: Awards two skill points after the third distinct track is represented.
achievements.title: Balanced Specialist

achievements.antiFarmingNote: Experience from duplicated, stale, malformed, or wrong-game events cannot be used to force the level threshold.
achievements.completionEvidence: The profile’s authoritative current level must reach ten after experience caps, replay protection, and corrections are applied.
achievements.playerFacingDescription: Reach level ten through accumulated authoritative experience and establish a mature progression profile.
achievements.rewardDisclosure: Awards two skill points and ten general career reputation after the authoritative progression profile reaches level ten.
achievements.title: Established Professional

reputationTypes.disclosureGuidance: Show the score and scope only when the player’s privacy setting permits it; do not infer hidden relationship or story history from a country score.
reputationTypes.playerFacingDescription: Reflects verified trust and standing within a specific country scope, including lawful participation, public-service outcomes, and country-linked economic conduct.
reputationTypes.recoveryGuidance: Recovery should come from eligible corrective actions, completed obligations, and documented country-specific service rather than record deletion.
reputationTypes.title: Country Reputation

reputationTypes.disclosureGuidance: Present the score with its scope and evidence category; never present it as a guarantee of future performance or employment eligibility.
reputationTypes.playerFacingDescription: Reflects verified professional reliability across Contracts, enterprise operations, production, and other career-linked outcomes within its declared scope.
reputationTypes.recoveryGuidance: Use completed corrective work, reliable delivery, and immutable correction records to rebuild a damaged career score.
reputationTypes.title: Career Reputation

reputationTypes.disclosureGuidance: Do not expose private chapter outcomes, hidden branches, or inferred decisions through public summaries or unrelated APIs.
reputationTypes.playerFacingDescription: Reflects recognized campaign decisions and chapter outcomes within a story scope, including choices that may remain private until the player elects disclosure.
reputationTypes.recoveryGuidance: Story recovery must follow supported chapters or correction events and cannot rewrite the immutable history of earlier decisions.
reputationTypes.title: Story Reputation

reputationTypes.disclosureGuidance: Treat relationship scope and history as private unless explicitly made public; never use the score to enumerate hidden participants or contacts.
reputationTypes.playerFacingDescription: Reflects verified conduct within a declared relationship scope, such as kept commitments, disputes, corrections, and recovery actions.
reputationTypes.recoveryGuidance: Restore trust through documented commitments and accepted corrective action while preserving the prior dispute and correction lineage.
reputationTypes.title: Relationship Reputation

skills.boundary: This skill does not reveal future prices, change execution, reduce losses, or guarantee a profitable decision.
skills.playerFacingDescription: Learn to separate price movement from evidence. Market Literacy helps you read basic quotes, spreads, liquidity warnings, country exposure, and event context before you place or evaluate a trade.
skills.practicalUnlock: Adds clearer explanations and review prompts for market information that already exists in the current runtime.
skills.title: Market Literacy

skills.boundary: The review can expose risk but cannot prevent a valid order from losing value or eliminate market uncertainty.
skills.playerFacingDescription: Turn market knowledge into a repeatable downside review. Risk Discipline emphasizes position size, concentration, liquidity, timing, and the difference between a verified fact and an uncertain scenario.
skills.practicalUnlock: Adds advanced risk explanations and structured order-review prompts before eligible market actions.
skills.title: Risk Discipline

skills.boundary: A coherent strategy is not a promise of performance and does not create automatic diversification or protection.
skills.playerFacingDescription: Build a documented portfolio thesis across countries, sectors, time horizons, and cash needs. Portfolio Strategy focuses on why positions belong together and when the original rationale should be reconsidered.
skills.practicalUnlock: Adds portfolio-planning guidance, scenario comparison, and rebalancing explanations where supported by current market data.
skills.title: Portfolio Strategy

skills.boundary: The skill does not create a business, supply a customer, approve financing, or guarantee that projected demand will occur.
skills.playerFacingDescription: Translate an idea into a bounded operating plan. Enterprise Basics helps identify the customer, value proposition, required inputs, expected payment, fixed commitments, and the first evidence that demand is real.
skills.practicalUnlock: Adds business-planning guidance and operating checklists for supported enterprise and Contract decisions.
skills.title: Enterprise Basics

skills.boundary: Better operating analysis does not bypass labor, inventory, time, authorization, or cash constraints.
skills.playerFacingDescription: Design repeatable work instead of relying on one successful transaction. Operating Systems connects staffing, inventory, production, quality, cash timing, and exception handling into an auditable routine.
skills.practicalUnlock: Adds deeper production, staffing, workflow, and operating-risk analysis for supported business actions.
skills.title: Operating Systems

skills.boundary: The skill provides decision support only; it does not modify prices, margins, demand, credit approval, or competitive behavior.
skills.playerFacingDescription: Make explicit choices about where the enterprise will compete and what it will not pursue. Enterprise Strategy evaluates advantage, dependency, financing exposure, growth sequencing, and exit conditions.
skills.practicalUnlock: Adds strategic planning views and scenario guidance without directly changing economic outcomes.
skills.title: Enterprise Strategy

skills.boundary: The skill does not supply missing inputs, unlock unauthorized recipes, increase output, or remove Crafting failure conditions.
skills.playerFacingDescription: Read a recipe as an economic and technical commitment. Workshop Basics clarifies required materials, equipment, authorization, energy, timing, expected output, and the cost of a failed or interrupted job.
skills.practicalUnlock: Adds Crafting guidance and material-planning explanations for currently supported recipes and equipment.
skills.title: Workshop Basics

skills.boundary: Quality guidance cannot transform an invalid input into a valid one or guarantee that every job passes inspection.
skills.playerFacingDescription: Define what acceptable output means before production begins. Quality Control emphasizes material verification, calibration, inspection evidence, defect isolation, and the decision to repair, downgrade, or reject an output.
skills.practicalUnlock: Adds advanced quality, failure-risk, inspection, and recovery explanations for supported production workflows.
skills.title: Quality Control

skills.boundary: The skill does not create free capacity, reduce authoritative material costs, or permit unsupported parallel production.
evidenceExamples: buyer demand and inventory exit plan
skills.playerFacingDescription: Coordinate production across capacity, maintenance, inventory, quality, and demand. Production Mastery supports deliberate sequencing and makes bottlenecks, downtime, and substitute-material consequences visible.
skills.practicalUnlock: Adds production-planning tools and multi-step guidance without bypassing recipe or resource requirements.
skills.title: Production Mastery

skills.boundary: The skill does not grant eligibility, override policy, expose private information, or prevent a lawful negative decision.
skills.playerFacingDescription: Understand which institution has authority and which claims are only informal advice. Civic Literacy clarifies country policy, eligibility, public records, correction history, and the consequences of using an unverified route.
skills.practicalUnlock: Adds country-policy, institution, eligibility, and reputation explanations where authoritative state is available.
skills.title: Civic Literacy

skills.boundary: The skill does not reveal private reputation fields, force another actor’s response, or erase legitimate negative history.
skills.playerFacingDescription: Treat trust as a history of verifiable conduct rather than a hidden score to exploit. Relationship Building emphasizes commitments, corrections, boundaries, reciprocity, and recovery after a documented failure.
skills.practicalUnlock: Adds relationship-history and reputation-recovery guidance for supported interactions and progression records.
skills.title: Relationship Building

skills.boundary: The skill cannot guarantee agreement, conceal required disclosures, bypass authorization, or prevent consequences from verified misconduct.
skills.playerFacingDescription: Plan across institutions, countries, and competing interests while preserving evidence and recovery options. Diplomatic Strategy makes stakeholder incentives, public commitments, private constraints, and long-term trust effects explicit.
skills.practicalUnlock: Adds advanced reputation-planning and stakeholder-analysis guidance without immunity from reputation losses.
skills.title: Diplomatic Strategy
